websocket_stats_t(3) Library Functions Manual websocket_stats_t(3)

NAME

websocket_stats_t - Network statistics.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/network/websocket/server.h>

Data Fields


atomic_t bytes_sent
Total bytes sent. atomic_t bytes_received
Total bytes received. atomic_t packets_sent
Total packets sent. atomic_t packets_received
Total packets received. time_t start_time
Server start time.

Detailed Description

Network statistics.

Definition at line 104 of file include/ascii-chat/network/websocket/server.h.
